# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Content correction (requires scholarly review)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / quality
- [ ] CI / infrastructure
- [ ] Marketing / da'wah materials

## Project guarantees — confirm by ticking

- [ ] No new internet access from the app
- [ ] No new analytics / tracking / telemetry
- [ ] No new ads
- [ ] No new Android or iOS permissions (or: documented + justified below)
- [ ] No Arabic hadith text modifications (or: citation included below)

## Testing

- [ ] `flutter analyze` is clean
- [ ] `flutter test` passes (mention the count)
- [ ] Coverage doesn't drop below current floor (25%)
- [ ] If UI: smoke-tested on at least one real device or emulator

## Related issues

Closes #...
